notableEvents.label: Isiah Kiner-Falefa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isiah Kiner-Falefa grounds into a double play, third baseman Coby Mayo to second baseman Blaze Alexander to first baseman Pete Alonso. Mickey Gasper out at 2nd. Isiah Kiner-Falefa out at 1st.
